summary: Attendance management system with fixes for inverted name display and addition of present/leaving time tracking.
known_issues: Attendance system displays names in inverted order

existing_features.title: Fix the attendance system so that registered person names are displayed in the correct (non-inverted) order in the attendance list UI. Names should appear exactly as they were registered, not reversed or flipped.

Add 'Present Time' and 'Leaving Time' fields to the attendance system. When a person is marked as present (face recognized), record the timestamp as their present time. When they are marked as leaving (or the session ends / a leave event is triggered), record the timestamp as their leaving time. Both times should be displayed in the attendance records list.

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix inverted name display in attendance system
Add present time and leaving time fields to attendance system
